headline: Why Netflix or Disney Should Hijack Fox’s Roku Deal
summary: Markets may soon have to grapple with another media M&A battle, just months after the end of the  messy  Warner Bros. Discovery  takeover saga.  Fox  said on Monday that it had agreed to buy streaming device maker  Roku  for $22 billion in stock and cash.  “  Disney Netflix  or  Comcast  could come over the top, so long as they are willing to pay the $900 million termination fee,” Wolfe Research analyst Peter Supino said in a research note this week.

headline: Disney (DIS) Faces Pan European Patent Injunction Across 11 EU Countries
summary: A pan European court has issued an injunction against Walt Disney over alleged infringement of InterDigital's video encoding patent. The ruling covers 11 EU countries and targets aspects of Disney's streaming and video distribution activities. This is the first broad UPC level action affecting Disney's media operations across multiple European markets at once. For investors watching NYSE:DIS, this legal setback lands while the stock trades at $101.28 and has declined 9.5% year to date and...

headline: 3 Reasons to Sell DIS and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Over the past six months, Disney’s stock price fell to $101.22. Shareholders have lost 8.5% of their capital, which is disappointing considering the S&P 500 has climbed by 12.4%. This might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: Walt Disney (DIS) Stock Could Be 23% Undervalued On Film Slate And Parks Optimism
summary: Recent commentary around Walt Disney (DIS) has centered on analyst expectations for a more profitable film slate in FY26, supported by Toy Story 5 and the ongoing reliance on the Parks division as a key earnings engine. See our latest analysis for Walt Disney. Disney’s recent share price moves have been mixed, with the stock down about 9% on a year to date share price return yet showing a positive 3 year total shareholder return of 15.5%. This suggests sentiment has been rebuilding gradually...

headline: Exclusive: Universal beat Disney as Hollywood’s maker of the most expensive movie of all time
summary: Financial statements show a colossal $659 million was spent making “Jurassic World: Dominion”—more than Disney spent on its “Star Wars” franchise.

headline: Fox Is Buying Roku. Is It a Better Buy than Netflix, Disney, and Paramount Skydance?
summary: The deal not only makes good strategic sense, but shouldn't face as much of the regulatory hassle that's been hounding other streaming-industry dealmaking of late.

headline: Fox Swings For The Fences, And Investors Duck For Cover
summary: If you held Fox (FOXA) stock over the weekend, Monday was a rough morning. The shares plunged -16.8% in a single session, a brutal drop on a day the S&P 500 actually climbed +1.8%. So what gives? Fox didn't miss earnings or slash guidance. It went shopping.
